confirm.emptyTrash: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all snippets in Trash?
moveVaultOverwrite: The selected directory is not empty. Its contents will be overwritten by the current vault.
migrateToMarkdown: The selected vault will be overwritten with the current SQLite library.

success.migrateToMarkdown: Migrated to Markdown Vault. Folders: {{folders}}, snippets: {{snippets}}, tags: {{tags}}.

warning.allSnippetsMoveToTrash: All snippets in this folder will be moved to trash.
warning.deleteTag: This will also cause all snippets to have that tag removed.
warning.htmlCssPreview: Add HTML fragment to see the result. Add CSS for styling and JavaScript for interactivity.

description.storageVault: Choose the vault directory. To sync between devices, select a folder in iCloud Drive, Google Drive or Dropbox.
description.language: To apply language changes, you need to reload the app.
description.migrateSqliteUtility: If you have a massCode.db file from a previous version, use this utility to import your data into the current Markdown Vault.

special.supportMessage:
Hi, Anton here 👋

Thanks for using massCode. If you find this app useful, please {{-tagStart}}donate{{-tagEnd}}. It will inspire me to continue development on the project.
